title: Unified 4-Indicator Buy/Sell System (60pt62, PMO exact)
author: seantrading2
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Unified 4-Indicator Buy/Sell System (60pt62, PMO exact) by seantrading2.

use these signal alongside price momentum oscillator, use the settings 10,10,8 for the PMO take the signal as long as you are on the right side of pmo, longs above 0 shorts below 0, entry at open of next candle, stops to high or low of signal candle and take profit at 1rr.

if you get a win, don't chase the following moves even if they are all the right setup, just wait for a new hma color to show use these signal alongside price momentum oscillator, use the settings 10,10,8 for the PMO take the signal as long as you are on the right side of pmo, longs above 0 shorts below 0, entry at open of next candle, stops to high or low of signal candle and take profit at 1rr.
